mapper.sql: id, name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_category_group WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_category_group WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_category_group (id, name, description, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}
